name: qiankun-micro-frontend-demo
description: 微前端初学者参考项目 - qiankun + Vue3 + React

scripts.install:all: cd main-app && npm install && cd ../vue3-app && npm install && cd ../react-app && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently -n main,vue3,react -c blue,green,red "cd main-app && npm run dev" "cd vue3-app && npm run dev" "cd react-app && npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:vue3 && npm run build:react
